results.title: Spider-Man: Brand New Day Stars Tease Grey Hulk And How Movie Deals With The Punisher's Foul Mouth
results.description: The cast of Spider-Man: Brand New Day has sat down to talk more about the movie, including Sadie Sink's mystery role, the possibility of Grey Hulk, and how the PG-13 title tackles Frank Castle.

results.title: “Hollywood Shock: Bob Odenkirk’s Saul Goodman Returns With a ‘Patriotic Message’ That Has Everyone Talking”
results.description: Actor Bob Odenkirk surprised fans by stepping back into one of television’s most recognizable roles as the United States marked its 250th anniversary. In a newly released social media video, Odenkirk once again became Saul Goodman, the fast-talking attorney made famous through the acclaimed crime dramas Breaking Bad and Better Call Saul. The appearance immediately [...]
